testcase.name: test_products_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'products': [{'base_price': 8000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Apparel', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}, {'hex': '#1E3A5F', 'name': 'Navy'}], ...}, {'base_price': 15000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Apparel', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}, {'hex': '#1E3A5F', 'name': 'Navy'}], ...}, {'base_price': 6000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Apparel', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}], ...}, {'base_price': 5000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Drinkware', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}], ...}, {'base_price': 8000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Stationery', 'colors': [{'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}, {'hex': '#1E3A5F', 'name': 'Navy'}], ...}, {'base_price': 45000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Signage', 'colors': [], ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_distribution_margin_api.py:173: in test_products_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'products': [{'base_price': 8000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Apparel', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}, {'hex': '#1E3A5F', 'name': 'Navy'}], ...}, {'base_price': 15000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Apparel', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}, {'hex': '#1E3A5F', 'name': 'Navy'}], ...}, {'base_price': 6000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Apparel', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}], ...}, {'base_price': 5000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Drinkware', 'colors': [{'hex': '#FFFFFF', 'name': 'White'}, {'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}], ...}, {'base_price': 8000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Stationery', 'colors': [{'hex': '#000000', 'name': 'Black'}, {'hex': '#1E3A5F', 'name': 'Navy'}], ...}, {'base_price': 45000, 'branch': 'Promotional Materials', 'category': 'Signage', 'colors': [], ...}, ...]}, list)
